name: che-apple-mail-mcp
description: Apple Mail MCP server — 44+ tools, reply-as-draft + IDD task enforcement + NSQL confirmation + .claude/.mail/ namespace (shell v2.10.3, binary v2.6.0)。Shell v2.10.3: 通知 binary v2.6.0 — 16 issues 一輪 marathon (8 PRs)。安全強化:id 注入防護 (#50)、附件路徑 deny-list (#38)、email 地址驗證 (#41)、type-strict handler params (#35)、新 SECURITY.md。Bug fix:forward_email plain mode 也終於嵌入 quoted original (#44)。Quality:cc_additional dedup、schema test 強化、indent cleanup。Tests:gated integration tests for reply runtime。新 env var MAIL_MCP_ATTACHMENT_ROOTS。疊加 v2.5.0 reply quote、v2.4.0 reply-as-draft、v2.9.0 task enforcement、v2.8.0 namespace、v2.7.0 NSQL confirmation。
